description.p: A native GNOME app to manage your ~/.bashrc aliases visually. Add, edit, delete, and search aliases without touching the terminal.

ul.li: Live sync with ~/.bashrc — the alias list updates instantly when the file changes
Add, edit, and delete aliases with a clean dialog
Timestamped backup of ~/.bashrc created before every write
Search across alias names, commands, and descriptions in real time
Preserves your ~/.bashrc order and works with manually written aliases too

screenshot.caption: Main window showing the alias list
